0.10.1.note: V1 attention backends; selector picks one from platform+capability+features.
Newer `vllm bench ...` CLI lives in vllm/benchmarks; standalone scripts in benchmarks/.
How vLLM wraps models for torch.compile + piecewise CUDA-graph capture.
Config split into a package in recent versions.
V1 CPU worker/runner + CPU platform gating.
C++/CUDA/HIP ops bound into torch.ops; built via CMake. ROCm hipifies the same sources. Reserve for cases Triton cannot cover.
Parallel groups + collective ops + per-device communicators (custom all-reduce, pynccl).

0.10.1.area: Engine arguments / CLI flags / config plumbing
0.10.1.note: All --flags map to fields here; this is where a new engine argument is declared and wired into the config.

0.10.1.area: Engine core / request lifecycle / add_request / step loop
0.10.1.note: V1 engine: EngineCore (scheduler+KV) usually runs in its own process; Processor tokenizes, OutputProcessor detokenizes/streams.
Authoritative registry of every VLLM_* variable and its default; add new env toggles here.
V1 executor fans work to workers.

0.10.1.area: KV cache manager / paged blocks / prefix caching / memory accounting
0.10.1.note: V1 KV cache: block allocation, prefix-cache hashing, profiling-based pool sizing.
Connectors move KV between prefill and decode instances.

0.10.1.area: Model layers (linear, norm, rotary, activation, embeddings)
0.10.1.note: Reuse these so TP/quantization/backends work automatically in a model.
LoRA layer wrappers + adapter management; punica kernels do batched LoRA.

0.10.1.area: Model definitions / add or port a model / architecture registry
0.10.1.note: One file per architecture; register the HF `architectures` name in registry.py. Copy the closest model as a starting point.
Fused MoE kernels + the FusedMoE layer used by MoE models.
Input processing/caching; the model file wires embeddings into the LM.

0.10.1.area: Offline LLM class / generate / encode entrypoint
0.10.1.note: The offline Python API.

0.10.1.area: OpenAI-compatible API server / endpoints / chat template / tool calling
0.10.1.note: HTTP layer; keep it thin and push logic into the engine. Tool-call parsers live in tool_parsers/.
Centralize device-specific decisions here, not scattered if-cuda checks.
Each method is a QuantizationConfig + linear/MoE method; add new schemes here.

0.10.1.area: Sampling / logits processing / penalties / guided masking
0.10.1.note: V1 sampling lives under vllm/v1/sample.

0.10.1.area: Sampling params / request outputs data structures
0.10.1.note: User-facing request config + output containers.
V1 scheduler: per-step admission of prefill/decode within token+memory budget.

0.10.1.area: Speculative decoding (draft model / ngram / EAGLE / Medusa / MTP)
0.10.1.note: V1 speculative decoding.

0.10.1.area: Structured / guided decoding (JSON schema, regex, grammar, xgrammar/outlines)
0.10.1.note: V1 structured output (grammar compiled to token masks).
Mirror the package layout: a change in vllm/v1/core maps to tests/v1/core. Compare model output/logits vs HF; kernels vs a native reference.
Tokenizer loading in transformers_utils; V1 incremental detokenization in the engine.

0.10.1.area: Worker / model runner / forward execution / CUDA graph capture
0.10.1.note: V1 worker/runner: builds the flattened per-step batch and runs the forward (often under CUDA graphs).
